name: io.circleci.mcp/mcp-server-circleci
title: CircleCI MCP Server
description: Connect AI coding agents to CircleCI — debug pipelines, retrieve build logs and test results, validate config, trigger runs, and optimize resource usage directly from your editor.

CIRCLECI_TOKEN.description: CircleCI personal API token. Generate one at https://app.circleci.com/settings/user/tokens

CIRCLECI_BASE_URL.description: CircleCI base URL. Required only for on-premises installations. Defaults to https://circleci.com

MAX_MCP_OUTPUT_LENGTH.description: Maximum output length for MCP responses in characters. Defaults to 50000.
